home.hero_text: In 2025 we reached our 85th represented residential complex. Over the last 14 years we have provided project management consultancy and feasibility studies for 41 residential complexes. We are currently active in the market with approximately 19 projects for sale.
home.despre_text: NEOFORT is a group of companies with over 21 years of experience in activities related to real estate and construction.
home.vanzare_text: Neofort IMO — Representation of residential complexes under construction or in final stages, available for reservation or sale.
home.dezvoltare_text: Neofort NEW HOMES — Real estate development of residential projects in central and ultra-central areas of Bucharest.
home.tamplarie_text: Neofort BIZ — regional supplier of PVC carpentry, aluminium carpentry, shading systems, nZEB systems, automations and carpentry accessories, with a history dating back to 2005.
